judgment.summary: Strong growth in revenue and earnings, coupled with robust margins and a positive analyst consensus, supports a favorable fundamental outlook.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 68.2%; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Earnings growth 74.8% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 76.7% indicate strong profitability expansion.
Revenue growth 16.6% YoY shows continued top-line expansion.
Operating margin 13.1% and profit margin 12.2% demonstrate healthy operational efficiency.
Return on equity 24.3% suggests effective use of shareholder capital.
Consensus rating is 'strong_buy' with a mean target price significantly above the current spot price.
negatives: Forward P/E 26.98x and PEG ratio 1.83x suggest the stock is priced for significant future growth.
Debt/Equity ratio of 53.30% indicates a notable level of leverage.
Total debt $235.54B exceeds total cash $143.09B, resulting in negative net debt.
Free cash flow TTM $9.81B, while positive, is considerably lower than net income, suggesting potential working capital pressures or significant reinvestment.

news.paragraph: Amazon is seeing analyst optimism driven by AWS and AI growth, with recent reports highlighting its position as a key cloud stock. While the broader chip rally may be cooling, attention is shifting to companies like Amazon that are poised to benefit from AI infrastructure demand. The upcoming earnings report will be a key catalyst to watch, especially concerning commentary on cloud services and AI investments.

headlines.title: The Furious Chip Rally Was Petering Out. Now Wall Street Turns to Nvidia.
Is Amazon.com (AMZN) One Of The Best Cloud Stocks To Buy As Azure Growth Hits 40%?
Analysts Express Optimism on Amazon (AMZN) Amid AWS and AI Growth
